title: Whirlpool India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Whirlpool India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at Whirlpool India Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Whirlpool India Advisory Limited:
Whirlpool India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Whirlpool India Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
